course_description: Annual workplace safety refresher required for all staff. Covers hazard identification, emergency procedures, and incident reporting.
Mandatory annual compliance training covering data protection, code of conduct, and conflicts of interest.
Foundational leadership skills for new and aspiring managers. Covers communication, delegation, and performance conversations.
A guided onboarding journey for new team members covering systems, culture, and your 30-60-90 day plan.
Practical guide to data privacy obligations under GDPR. Required for all staff who handle personal data.
Core cybersecurity hygiene: phishing recognition, password management, device security, and incident reporting.
Basic first aid awareness: recognising emergencies, CPR overview, using a defibrillator, and when to call for help.
